name: ownCloud
description: A smart cloud for your files
compose:
name: slashnode-owncloud
services:
  server:
    image: owncloud/server:10.16.2
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - mariadb
      - redis
    environment:
      OWNCLOUD_DOMAIN: ${DEVICE_DOMAIN_NAME}:8080
      OWNCLOUD_TRUSTED_DOMAINS: ${DEVICE_DOMAIN_NAME},${node.exports.host},${APP_OWNCLOUD_LOCAL_IPS}
      OWNCLOUD_DB_TYPE: mysql
      OWNCLOUD_DB_NAME: owncloud
      OWNCLOUD_DB_USERNAME: owncloud
      OWNCLOUD_DB_PASSWORD: owncloud
      OWNCLOUD_DB_HOST: owncloud_mariadb_1
      OWNCLOUD_ADMIN_USERNAME: admin
      OWNCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      OWNCLOUD_MYSQL_UTF8MB4: 'true'
      OWNCLOUD_REDIS_ENABLED: 'true'
      OWNCLOUD_REDIS_HOST: owncloud_redis_1
      OWNCLOUD_LOG_LEVEL: '2'
    volumes:
      - server_data-app:/mnt/data
      - server_data-config:/var/www/html/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8666:8080
  mariadb:
    image: mariadb:10.11
    container_name: mariadb
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    command:
      - '--max-allowed-packet=128M'
      - '--innodb-log-file-size=64M'
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: owncloud
      MYSQL_USER: owncloud
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: owncloud
      MYSQL_DATABASE: owncloud
      MARIADB_AUTO_UPGRADE: '1'
    volumes:
      - mariadb_data-db:/var/lib/mysql
  redis:
    image: redis:6-alpine
    container_name: redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    command:
      - '--databases'
      - '1'
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-app:
    name: slashnode-owncloud_server_data-app
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-owncloud_server_data-config
  mariadb_data-db:
    name: slashnode-owncloud_mariadb_data-db
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-owncloud_redis_data-redis
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (owncloud). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://owncloud.com. Default login — user: "admin", password: "".
